PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Bail appeared by telephone for Proposed Executrix.

The Court stated that everything suggest based on the evidence that the Decedent's circumstances changed, that she asked for the will back, that she did not return it and that it is presumed that she destroyed it. The Court also stated that it does not see a basis to proceed under a lost will. The Court denied the petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary without prejudice to any other petitions that are appropriate being filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
